steps.t: The wharf is on the eastern side of Dol Amroth. You should make your way to the wharf.
Anírwen is at the wharf on the east side of Dol Amroth. You should speak with Anírwen.
The Artisan's Quarter is in north Dol Amroth. You should make your way to the Artisan's Quarter.
The Artisan's Quarter is in north-east Dol Amroth. You should speak with someone at the Artisan's Quarter.
The Keep of the Swan-knights is in north Dol Amroth. You should make your way to the Keep of the Swan-knights.
The Keep of the Swan-knights is in north Dol Amroth. You should speak with one of the swan-knights.
Inzibel's Walk is in north-east Dol Amroth. You should make your way to Inzibel's Walk.
The Court of the Fount is in the centre of Dol Amroth. You should make your way to the Court of the Fount.
The Court of the Fount is in the centre of Dol Amroth. You should speak with someone at the Court of the Fount.
The Library of Saphadzîr is just south of the centre of Dol Amroth. You should make your way to the Library of Saphadzîr.
The Scholar's Quarter is in southern Dol Amroth. You should make your way to the Scholar's Quarter.
The Scholar's Quarter is in southern Dol Amroth. You should speak with someone in the Scholar's Quarter.
The Mason's Court is in southern Dol Amroth. You should make your way to the Mason's Court.
Laegened, the master stone-mason, can be found in the Mason's Court. You should speak with Laegened.
The Harper's Court is in western Dol Amroth. You should make your way to the Harper's Court.
The Harper's Court is in western Dol Amroth. You should speak with someone in the Harper's Court.
Lothíriel is in the Great Hall of the Prince. You should speak with Lothíriel.
